title: Basilica of the Holy-Rosary
tagline: Basilica of the Holy-Rosary — spiritual town of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Basilica of the Holy-Rosary, West Bengal

overview.short: The Basilica of the Holy Rosary (commonly known as Bandel Church) is one of the oldest Christian churches in West Bengal, India.
overview.description: The Basilica of the Holy Rosary (commonly known as Bandel Church) is one of the oldest Christian churches in West Bengal, India. Situated in Bandel, Hooghly district of West Bengal, it stands as a memorial to the Portuguese settlement in Bengal. Founded in 1599, it is dedicated to Nossa Senhora do Rosário, Our Lady of the Rosary. It is also a parish church, part of the Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Calcutta.

topPlaces.name: Don Bosco Bandel
topPlaces.description: Don Bosco School, Bandel is an all-boys, English medium school in Sahaganj, Hooghly, West Bengal, India. It was established in 1978 and run by the Salesians of Don Bosco which is a congregation within the Catholic Church.

topPlaces.name: Hooghly Gour Hari Harijan Vidya Mandir
topPlaces.description: Hooghly Gour Hari Harijan Vidya Mandir is a co-ed school in Chawk Bazar near Bandel/Chinsurah, India, on the bank of the Hooghly River. The school was inaugurated by Mahatma Gandhi on 8 March 1921.

image.alt: Hooghly Gour Hari Harijan Vidya Mandir

topPlaces.name: Hooghly Imambara
topPlaces.description: The Hooghly Imambara is a Twelver Shia congregation hall and mosque, located in Hooghly, in the state of West Bengal, India. The construction of the building was started by Muhammad Mohsin in 1841 and completed in 1861.

topPlaces.name: Jubilee Bridge (India)
topPlaces.description: The Jubilee Bridge (Bengali: জুবিলি ব্রিজ) is a former rail bridge over the Hooghly River between Naihati and Bandel in Kolkata, West Bengal, India. It provided an important connection between Garifa railway station and Hooghly Ghat railway station.

topPlaces.name: Sampreeti Bridge
topPlaces.description: Sampreeti Setu or Sampreeti Bridge is a railway bridge on Hooghly River located near Hugli-Chuchura. This bridge was inaugurated on 17 April 2016.

topPlaces.name: Bandel
topPlaces.description: Bandel is a city in the Hooghly district of the Indian state of West Bengal. It was founded by Portuguese settlers and falls under the jurisdiction of Chandernagore Police Commissionerate.

topPlaces.name: Keota, Hooghly
topPlaces.description: Keota is a census town in Chinsurah Mogra CD Block in Chinsurah subdivision of Hooghly district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Kodalia
topPlaces.description: Kodalia is a census town in Chinsurah Mogra CD Block in Chinsurah subdivision of Hooghly district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

The Jubilee Bridge (Bengali: জুবিলি ব্রিজ) is a former rail bridge over the Hooghly River between Naihati and Bandel in Kolkata, West Bengal, India. It provided an important connection between Garifa railway station and Hooghly Ghat railway station.
Sampreeti Setu or Sampreeti Bridge is a railway bridge on Hooghly River located near Hugli-Chuchura. This bridge was inaugurated on 17 April 2016.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of the Holy-Rosary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of the Holy-Rosary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of the Holy-Rosary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of the Holy-Rosary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of the Holy-Rosary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of the Holy-Rosary?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of the Holy-Rosary start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of the Holy-Rosary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Don Bosco Bandel, Hooghly Gour Hari Harijan Vidya Mandir, Hooghly Imambara, Jubilee Bridge (India), Sampreeti Bridge.
